response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience and demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, aligning with key responsibilities, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years specifically in production-grade AI solutions, cloud-based GenAI system design, or vector database/RAG implementation, and his resume emphasizes legacy systems and diverse tools over focused GenAI expertise.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack background with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source contributions, and mentoring
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems or RAG architectures
Lack of clear experience with vector databases, LLM metrics, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Education shows only a BS; no advanced degree or formal AI/ML specialization highlighted

key_factors.factor: Broad Tech Stack vs. Focused AI Expertise
